title: Add analytics contracts and analysis scope rules
requirements: Add schemas for analytics sources, analysis_scope_rules, business_facts, metrics, monitors, diagnostic_playbooks, workflow_routes, dedup_rules and retention_profiles.
Analysis scope rules must support source allowlists, source exclusions, time windows, scope_tokens, sensitivity filters, sampling strategy and hard limits.
Validation must reject prompt-only access boundaries and missing owner/sensitivity fields.
